items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of the persona scenario regarding AI-generated parameters. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the scenario behavior or the results of the validation process. The linked use cases and prior steps do not offer sufficient details to confirm whether the expected result of a clear, actionable failure report or confirmation of support was achieved.
